PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Matulich for Robyn Dorsett. Paul Melbostad for Goldstein, Gelman, Melbostad and Gibson-Harris, LLP. Victor Makras in Propria Persona.

Mr. Melbosatd and Mr. Matulich stated that they agreed to division of the fees. Mr. Matulich stated that his Client has an issue with the work performed by Mr. Makras, that she does not feel she has to pay him and that Mr. Makras did not file a creditor's claim. The Court stated that a remedy is for Mr. Makras to file a civil action. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Court will order set aside of a reserve for the amount in dipsute and set status on the reserve for January 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (to be refelcted in the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Ruiz.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Continued To Mar-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Matulich for and with Robyn Dorsett.

Mr. Matulich requested a two month continuance stating that they are close to having a Petition for Final Distribution, that they submitted the Inventory and Appraisal to the Probate Referee and that Ms. Dorsett is in the process of selling the property. The matter was continued to March 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the Petition for Final Distribution or filing of Status Report.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
